scripts.test:spec-profesor: VALOR=$(node -p "require('./spec.json').specifications.required_strings[0]"); if [ -z "$VALOR" ]; then exit 1; fi; grep -q "$VALOR" index.html
scripts.test:spec-prohibido: VALOR=$(node -p "require('./spec.json').specifications.forbidden_strings[0]"); if [ -z "$VALOR" ]; then exit 1; fi; ! grep -qi "$VALOR" index.html
scripts.test: npm run test:spec-profesor && npm run test:spec-prohibido
